headline: Raymond James Recruits $2.8B Team From Commonwealth
summary: The New Hampshire-based group of 12 advisors and 24 employees moves to Raymond James ahead of an end-of-year client transition deadline for LPL’s Commonwealth advisors.

headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock to Target This Week and 2 Facing Headwinds
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.

headline: Discover which S&P500 stocks are making waves on Thursday.
